Hi Liam. I heard there was an incident on Friday. What was happening when it started?
At nine, everything was normal. I was reviewing the payroll, and two managers were interviewing candidates.
While we were working, the system suddenly crashed. It was a total breakdown. Three people were in the middle of a handover.
That sounds stressful. What were you doing while IT was fixing it?
While the IT team was fixing the problem, I was handling the complaints. People were calling from every department.
You stayed calm. How did it end?
It took two hours, but we resolved it. Nobody panicked, and the crisis is over now.
I was handling the complaints during the crisis.

While I was investigating, I talked to several witnesses.

Hi Murielle, it's Liam. Let me tell you what happened last Friday, because it was quite a morning. At nine o'clock, the whole team was working normally. I was reviewing the payroll, two managers were interviewing candidates, and Sofia was preparing the report. Then, while we were working, the main system suddenly crashed. It was a complete breakdown. When the system went down, three employees were in the middle of a handover, and they lost their notes. People were calling me from every department, and I was trying to stay calm. While the IT team was fixing the problem, I was handling the complaints. It took two hours, but we resolved it. The good news is that nobody panicked, and the crisis is over now. I am sending you a short incident report. Talk soon.

Good morning, Murielle. This is Diana from London, with an update on the dispute in the sales team. Last week, while I was investigating the grievance, I spoke to several witnesses. Here is what I learned. On Monday afternoon, two employees were arguing in the meeting room when the manager walked in. According to the witnesses, one person was raising his voice while the other was taking notes for a complaint. It was not a case of serious misconduct, but the disruption was real. While we were reviewing the emails, we noticed the problem had started weeks earlier. The good news is that we resolved the dispute yesterday, and both employees agreed to a new arrangement. The investigation is closed. I am sending you the full report now. Thank you.
